changes: First loop: resolve comb_id and sum qty by comb_id
Second loop: INSERT once per comb_id with total_qty

After building items_tallas from FI detalle rows
Merge by SKU key: (linea, ref, id_material, id_color)
Sum tallas quantities for matching SKUs
Double protection: prevents duplicates at source + at INSERT

features: Detects duplicates: GROUP BY combinacion_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
Consolidates: DELETE all rows + INSERT consolidated with SUM(cantidad)

implementacion.strategy: Double protection (prevention at source + safe INSERT)

layer_2.accion: Group qty by combinacion_id before INSERT
layer_2.beneficio: Protects against duplicates even if input has overlaps
